backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the MediTrack backend, managing medical records, user profiles, family members, and file storage with role-based access control via mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (Records page, file viewer, delete, search/filter) to their associated source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, charts, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the MediTrack React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with protected and public routes, React Query client, theme provider, and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/AnalysisDashboar: Category-tabbed analysis dashboard that fetches records, parses JSON data fields, builds chart data, computes metric trends, and renders progression charts and trend summaries with a family member filter.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Wrapper component that shows a loading spinner while identity or profile loads, and renders a profile setup modal if the authenticated user has no profile yet.
frontend/src/components/CategoryFieldSet: Renders a dynamic form fieldset based on the selected medical record category (CBC, LFT, Cholesterol, etc.), using numeric input grids for lab values and textarea/select inputs for general ailments.
frontend/src/components/DashboardSidebar: Sticky sidebar component displaying navigation links and an overview panel with total record count and per-category breakdowns using color-coded badges.
frontend/src/components/FileUploadWithEx: Multi-step file upload component that selects a file, runs OCR extraction to pre-fill patient name and date fields, allows user review, then uploads the file via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/FileUploadZone.t: Drag-and-drop file upload zone supporting PDF, PNG, and JPEG files up to 5 MB, with validation error display and a selected-file preview state.
Modal dialog that previews a medical file record as an inline PDF iframe or image, with a download button and close control.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component wrapping all pages with a navigation bar, auth guard, optional dashboard sidebar (shown when records exist), page outlet, and footer.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing a loading spinner during authentication and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/MedicalRecordFor: A form component for adding medical records that supports multiple record categories (CBC, LFT, etc.), family member selection, field validation, and submits data via the useAddMedicalRecord mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: A sticky header navigation component that renders the MediTrack logo, authenticated nav links (Add Record, Timeline, Records, Analysis, Family), a user identity indicator, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name to create a health profile, submitting via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation and blocking dismissal until saved.
frontend/src/components/ProgressionChart: A Recharts-based line chart component that visualizes metric trends over time, with a custom tooltip showing reference range compliance and optional min/max reference lines for the primary metric.
frontend/src/components/RecordsFilters.t: A filter bar component for the records list that provides a text search input and two date-picker popovers (from/to) with a clear-all button to reset active filters.
frontend/src/components/RecordsList.tsx: A grid-based list component that displays uploaded medical file records (PDFs and images) as cards with thumbnail previews, a file viewer modal, and a delete confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/TimelineCard.tsx: Renders a single medical record card with expandable details, showing record type badge, date, and parsed metric fields with reference range indicators, plus a delete button.
frontend/src/components/TimelineView.tsx: Displays a filterable, tabbed timeline of medical records with family member selection, loading skeletons, and empty states, sorted newest-first.
frontend/src/components/TrendSummary.tsx: Renders a grid of metric trend cards showing direction icons, badges, value progression, and percent change for a list of MetricTrend objects.
frontend/src/components/UploadRecordForm: Form component that handles file upload, OCR text extraction, review/editing of extracted medical records, and saving them to the backend with optional family member assignment.
frontend/src/components/UserIdentityIndi: Dropdown UI component showing the authenticated user's display name and principal, with a logout action that clears identity and query cache.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to manage login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on user profiles, family members, and medical records via the backend actor. Exports typed query and mutation hooks that wrap actor calls with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for a medical teal color palette in both light and dark modes. Also defines reusable component utility classes like `.medical-card` and `.metric-badge`.
frontend/src/lib/ocrExtraction.ts: Utility library for extracting structured data (dates, patient names, test values) from raw text decoded from uploaded medical report files. Implements multiple regex-based parsing strategies for various date formats and labeled fields.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AddRecordPage.tsx: Page component for adding medical records, offering two tabs: manual entry via MedicalRecordForm and file upload via UploadRecordForm.
frontend/src/pages/AnalysisPage.tsx: Page component that renders the AnalysisDashboard for visualizing health metric trends and patterns.
frontend/src/pages/FamilyMembersPage.tsx: Page for managing family member profiles, allowing users to add (up to 8) and delete members with confirmation dialogs, displaying each member's record count.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page displaying a hero section, summary stats (total records, categories, latest entry), and feature cards linking to the add, timeline, and analysis pages.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Renders the MediTrack login page with Internet Identity authentication, redirecting already-authenticated users to the home route and showing a loading spinner during initialization.
frontend/src/pages/RecordsPage.tsx: Displays a filterable, searchable list of the user's medical records with an upload dialog for adding new records via file extraction.
frontend/src/pages/TimelinePage.tsx: Simple page wrapper that renders the TimelineView component with a header showing the user's complete health record history.
frontend/src/types/fileUpload.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and types for file upload state management, including file metadata, extracted test data, and upload status stages.
frontend/src/types/medicalRecords.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces, constants, and field configurations for all medical record types (CBC, LFT, Cholesterol, Blood Sugar, Blood Pressure, General Ailments) including reference ranges and display labels/colors.
frontend/src/utils/recordSummary.ts: Provides utility functions to aggregate parsed medical records by category, computing per-category counts and latest dates for summary display.
frontend/src/utils/trendAnalysis.ts: Implements trend analysis for medical metrics using linear regression slope, determining if values are improving, worsening, or stable relative to reference ranges, and provides chart data builders and metric key mappings per record type.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch CSS variables), fonts, border radii, animations, and plugins including typography, container queries, and tailwindcss-animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Medical Records Management app project, including schema version, architectural notes, existing implemented features (records listing, viewing, deletion, search/filter, OCR extraction), and new feature requests.
